title: crucianella gilanica subsp. suleimanica
intro: Crucianella gilanica subsp. suleimanica is a sub-species of the Crucianella gilanica plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family that is native to Iran. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crucianella gilanica subsp. suleimanica include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
